data.title: ANTHBOT Celebrates Anniversary with Spring Savings
data.description: To celebrate its anniversary and kick off the spring mowing season, ANTHBOT, a leading robotic lawn mower company, is rolling out special promotions in Europe. Customers can enjoy discounts of up to €270 on the M and N Series models. This limited-time offer will be available from March 30 to April 19. Take advantage of this promotion to equip your lawn with cutting-edge robotic technology at a reduced price.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says It's Time To Put His Laser Eyes Back On, Fellow Bitcoin Bull Chimes In: 'Never Took Them Off'
data.description: CEO Michael Saylor of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) reaffirmed his strong support for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) by sharing the popular "laser eyes" meme on Saturday. The meme, a signal of bullish conviction within the Bitcoin community, involves a person with glowing red eyes in their profile picture to symbolize intense focus on Bitcoin's price. Saylor reposted the meme, stating, "It's time to put the laser eyes back on." This move is seen as another push from Saylor to encourage HODLers to remain steadfast despite ongoing market pressures. Samson Mow, a fellow Bitcoin advocate, also...

data.title: Bitdeer Engages DCI to Finalise Development of Norway’s Largest AI Data Center
data.description: Targeted for completion by December 2026, the Tydal Data Center (TDC) with a capacity of 180 MW is set to serve as a hub for co-location services catering primarily to Nvidia's advanced Vera Rubin AI technology.

data.title: KFC turns its restaurant totems into giant kebabs to launch its new döner
data.description: PS21 has created a campaign featuring the brand's iconic imagery as a rotisserie to promote the debut of its new fried chicken kebab menu. The campaign will be live from March 24 to March 30 in several KFC locations in Spain. Additionally, there will be an audiovisual component crafted by Oriental.

data.title: Airoha Technology Achieves Global Milestone as First Silicon Provider to Successfully Commercialize prplOS-based Fiber Broadband Platforms
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Zhubei City, Airoha Technology, a subsidiary of MediaTek, revealed its pioneering role in adapting to the growing popularity of open-source systems among network operators worldwide. The company shared that after working closely with Tier-1 operators for three years, they have emerged as the leading provider in this space.

data.title: AKC Canine Health Foundation Joins All Access hosted by Andy Garcia to Explore the Science of Veterinary Innovation
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Los Angeles, the AKC Canine Health Foundation (CHF) revealed a partnership with the educational show "All Access hosted by Andy Garcia" to produce a documentary segment focusing on canine health research. The filming of the segment is scheduled for April 15, 2026.
Socgen: Brent oil may average $125/bbl in April on Mideast war

data.title: Preliminary data on early redemptions (prepayments)
data.description: On March 30, 2026, a company made an announcement (no. 29/2026) to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S regarding inside information.

data.title: Repurchase of Truecaller B shares in week 13, 2026
data.description: In Stockholm, during the week of March 23-27, 2026, Truecaller AB (publ) (LEI code 549300TEYF1FA5G5GK26) announced the repurchase of 500,000 of its own B shares (ISIN: SE0016787071). This amount represents 0.14% of the outstanding capital. This buyback is a part of the ongoing program initiated by the company.

data.title: Universal Music Group N.V. Announces €500 Million Share Buyback Program
data.description: Universal Music Group N.V. ("UMG") has revealed plans for its inaugural share buyback program, demonstrating strong confidence from management and the Board in the company's strategy and sustainable growth. The buyback program, taking place in HILVERSUM, The Netherlands, on March 30, 2026, is a significant move to show UMG's resilience in the industry. This initiative showcases UMG's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and capitalizing on future opportunities.
BlackRock Inc. notifications on Syensqo participation have been received.
Seoul stocks dip nearly 3 pct amid escalating Middle East conflict-YONHAP

data.title: New CUDA 13.2 update boosts performance on older GPUs, offers 5x speedups with improved Top-K algorithms & Python profiling tools.
data.description: CUDA version 13.2 introduces tile-based GPU programming to older architectures, along with Python profiling tools. The update also brings up to 5 times faster performance with the implementation of new Top-K algorithms.

data.title: Share buyback programme – week 13
data.description: The Danish Financial Supervisory Authority, along with other stakeholders, are working with stock exchanges such as Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and London Stock Exchange.
BoJ: We need to pay attention to the possibility that upward pressures on prices from rising crude oil prices may have strengthened as firms have become more proactive in hiking prices and wages

data.title: Analyst warns Ethereum could drop to $1.2K, showing signs of previous 45% and 48% drops, increasing risk of breakdown.
data.description: A cautionary signal from Ethereum suggests a potential bull trap, similar to previous instances that led to drops of 45% and 48%. This increases the likelihood of a new downturn in the market.

data.title: Aave expands to OKX’s Ethereum L2 X Layer, its 21st integration. Aave hits $1 trillion lending volume milestone.
data.description: The X Layer on the OKX platform has become the 21st blockchain to incorporate Aave, a significant achievement for the leading decentralized finance protocol. Aave's cumulative lending volume has recently exceeded an impressive milestone, surpassing $1 trillion. This partnership underscores the growing popularity and success of Aave within the blockchain and DeFi space, as it continues to expand its reach and impact across various platforms and ecosystems.

data.title: Senate could host Fed chair nominee hearing week of April 13. Senator Warren opposes appointment.
data.description: The Senate Banking Committee is set to hold a hearing for the nominee for Federal Reserve Chair in mid-April. Senator Elizabeth Warren has raised objections to the suggested appointment.

data.title: Ethereum's No. 2 position at risk as stablecoins climb. Polymarket odds of losing spot surged from 17% to 59% in 2026.
data.description: According to Polymarket, the probability of Ether dropping from its current position as the second-largest cryptocurrency by market cap in 2026 has significantly risen from 17% to more than 59%. This shift in odds is attributed to the rapid growth of stablecoins which are posing a challenge to Ether's ranking in the crypto market.

data.title: White House app under fire for location tracking & privacy concerns. App collects personal data, including phone numbers.
data.description: According to information provided on the Google Play Store page, the application being referenced gathers personal information, including phone numbers, during use. Conversely, on the App Store, users are directed to review the privacy policy of the White House for further details.
